dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 16, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Power Surge: Home Runs Punctuate Exciting MLB Slate"

Yesterday's MLB games saw a flurry of home runs, with nine players hitting multiple home runs across the league. Among them, Munetaka Murakami of the Chicago White Sox and Casey Schmitt of the San Francisco Giants led the charge with two home runs each. Schmitt also had a remarkable day at the plate, collecting four hits and three RBIs. Meanwhile, in a dominant pitching performance, Cristopher Sánchez threw a complete game shutout for the Philadelphia Phillies, striking out 13 batters without allowing a run.

In another impressive outing, Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings for the Colorado Rockies, striking out six batters and allowing three earned runs. Cade Cavalli of the Washington Nationals also made a statement, pitching 6.1 innings and striking out eight batters in a 13-3 victory over the Baltimore Orioles.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Spencer Miles: 3.2 IP, 5 K, 0 ER, 2 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Yohendrick Piñango: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays edged the Detroit Tigers 2-1 behind Yohendrick Piñango's 2 hits, including a home run, and a crucial single by Daulton Varsho.

all_games.game: Kansas City Royals @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.top_pitching_line: Kyle Leahy: 6.0 IP, 2 K, 1 ER, 3 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Jac Caglianone: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals edged the Kansas City Royals 4-2, with Jac Caglianone's 5th home run and Kyle Leahy's 6 strong innings leading the way.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Eduardo Rodriguez: 5.1 IP, 6 K, 3 ER, 0 BB, 9 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Mickey Moniak: 1 H, 0 HR, 2 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Colorado Rockies edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2 behind Eduardo Rodriguez's 5.1 innings of work, striking out 6 and allowing 3 earned runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Cade Cavalli: 6.1 IP, 8 K, 3 ER, 0 BB, 8 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Keibert Ruiz: 3 H, 1 HR, 5 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3 behind Cade Cavalli's 6.1 innings of work and Keibert Ruiz's 3 hits, 1 home run, and 5 RBIs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Cristopher Sánchez: 9.0 IP, 13 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 6 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Bryce Harper: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0 behind Cristopher Sánchez's 9-inning shutout with 13 strikeouts and Bryce Harper's 1 HR and 3 RBI.

all_games.summary: The Miami Marlins outlasted the Tampa Bay Rays 10-5, led by Javier Sanoja's 4 RBI and Sandy Alcantara's 6 strong innings with 6 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Trevor McDonald: 6.2 IP, 5 K, 1 ER, 1 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Casey Schmitt: 4 H, 2 HR, 3 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The San Francisco Giants edged the Athletics 6-4 behind Casey Schmitt's 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs, and Trevor McDonald's 6.2 strong innings.
